examples: Tom stood still, rather flustered by this onslaught.
When it comes to the reactions of the ecosystems to the onslaught of modern technology, there is no common language.
I watch my little daughter's face as she absorbs the powerful onslaught of arousing visuals and bloody special effects in movies.
What could have prompted such an onslaught of emotion, ranging from unadulterated excitement to utter incoherence?
Enterprises have had to develop their own staff and tools to counter the onslaught.
